title: Anomaly on Outbound Bytes from Database Subnet

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

spl:
index=network sourcetype=zeek:conn id.orig_h=10.50.* earliest=-7d
| timechart span=1h sum(orig_bytes) as b
| anomalydetection b action=annotate
value: Uses statistical anomaly detection on east-west bytes for adverse event triage.
implementation: (1) Label DB VLANs; (2) suppress backup windows; (3) integrate with IR runbook.
cimSpl: | tstats summariesonly=t sum(All_Traffic.bytes_in) as agg_value from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic by All_Traffic.action, All_Traffic.src, All_Traffic.dest, All_Traffic.dest_port span=1h | sort - agg_value
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
